description: Refactoring engine lifecycle hooks. Safe transformation, evidence-driven.

hooks.prompt:
DOMAIN: refactor-dev
IF task involves: refactoring, performance optimization, complexity reduction, code migration, or technical debt
THEN: Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/SKILL.md for safe transformation methodology.
RULE: Tests must exist BEFORE refactoring begins. Never refactor without a green baseline.
IF_SKIP: Risk breaking working code without safety net.

VERIFY: If code was refactored, were tests green before AND after the change?
IF_NO: Revert and establish test baseline first.
